title: Roughly Enough Recipes
description: RER adds vanila recipes to the game with QOL and uncraftable item recipe's
body:
RER adds a bunch of new vanila like recipes to the game for example tridents , name  tags , saddles.This mod is good for vanila like modpacks since the recipes look really normal and vanila like.



Uncraftable Item Recipes:

[https://imgur.com/a/5Io7AeE](https://imgur.com/a/5Io7AeE)

Feel Free To Use This In Your Modpacks  :3



These Links Will Not Have All The Recipes Included In The Mod Use JEI To Find The Rest

I Highly Reccomand Polymorph For This Aswell Some Recipes Might Collide With Other Mods

[CurseForge Version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/roughly-enough-recipes-rer)
